rationale: The imminent US-Iran deal signing is the most relevant new development for Poland, as it could ease energy market tensions and lower gas prices — a direct benefit for Polish households still sensitive to energy costs.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal scheduled to be signed Sunday
top_events.summary: A concluded US-Iran nuclear/sanctions deal could unlock Iranian oil/gas exports, easing European energy prices that still burden Polish households and industry.

top_events.title: Ukraine to keep targeting Russian energy infrastructure
top_events.summary: Ukraine's continued strikes on Russian energy assets could affect regional energy supply dynamics and prolong war intensity near Poland's eastern border.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US federal AI security restrictions have limited relevance for Polish daily life; minor indirect signal about global AI governance trajectory.
